title: Soo Kabashada Lacag-bixinta
askPrompt: Waxaan haynaa {failedCount} lacag-bixin oo fashilmay oo wadar ahaan ah {totalAmount}. Waxaan soo kabsanay {recoveredAmount} ({recoveryRate}% heer). {pendingRetry} lacag-bixin ayaa sugaya isku day kale. Sidee ayaan u wanaajin karnaa heerka soo kabashadeena?
